heading: Liability for acts of officers and agents
label: 70913 Liability for acts of officers and agents
text: The FFA is liable for the acts of its officers and agents acting within the scope of their authority.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)7091336:281., .Aug. 30, 1950, ch. 823, § 1164 Stat. 566
